---
title: "Jess Kowalski"
name: "Jess Kowalski"
image: "/images/profile_pics/jess_kowalski.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Neighbor-stranger discrimination in chestnut-backed antbirds (Poliocrania exsul) in Panama"
location: "**Research location:** Panama"
dates: "**Dates:** 2025-present"
category: "Current"
category_order: "5"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
